model.name: Sales Analytics
model.description: Enterprise sales analytics semantic model for the Power BI PoC. Implements a star schema with 500K+ transaction rows, 5 dimensions, and 63 DAX measures.

fact_tables.name: FactInventory
fact_tables.grain: One row per product per region per snapshot date

utility_tables.name: _Measures
utility_tables.description: Hidden utility table containing all 63 DAX measures

relationships.note: FactReturns and FactInventory relationships are inactive by default. Use USERELATIONSHIP() in DAX when calculating return or inventory metrics sliced by date or customer.

roles.name: Regional Analyst
roles.note: Replace placeholder RLS filter with production user-mapping table before deploying

setup_instructions.step_1: Update DataFolderPath parameter to your absolute data/raw/ path
setup_instructions.step_2: Open in Tabular Editor 3 or Power BI Desktop
setup_instructions.step_3: Mark DimDate as date table (Date column) for time intelligence
setup_instructions.step_4: Refresh data to load CSV files
